text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I can't believe I lost again. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I need you to give it to me straight. How
was my performance today?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Don't hold back—just let me have it. Feelings will
only muddle my calculations.
choice_data_list: It's for the sake of our next race, after all!
It's for the sake of our next race, after all!

You're not focusing only on what you did
wrong, are you?

You're not focusing only on what you did
wrong, are you?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Don't hold back—just let me have it. Feelings will
only muddle my calculations.
choice_data_list: It's for the sake of our next race, after all!
It's for the sake of our next race, after all!

You're not focusing only on what you did
wrong, are you?

You're not focusing only on what you did
wrong, are you?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer! Let's have a meeting as soon
as we get back.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's a meticulous and time-consuming process, but
strategizing for the sake of victory is worth it!

Afterwards, Biwa Hayahide and I hunker down to
discuss the race and what can be done to improve
her performance.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What else should I focus on if not that?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There's clearly something wrong with the way I'm
running my races now! Why else would I have
failed this badly?!
choice_data_list: That's not the right way to look at it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
choice_data_list: You have to look at both the good and the bad.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'm the one who's letting my feelings get in
the way.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I need to go clear my head.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for being so blunt. I needed to hear
that.

Biwa Hayahide goes off on a short run to blow off
some steam. Later, she joins me for a strategy
meeting feeling much better.
